hero.headline: Expert Electrical Services You Can Trust in Dallas, TX
hero.subheadline: From emergency repairs to full rewiring, our licensed electricians deliver safe, reliable, and affordable solutions. Rated 4.8 stars by your neighbors.

featureSections.title: Safe & Smart Home Electrical Solutions
featureSections.body: Your home's electrical system is its backbone. We provide comprehensive residential services including panel upgrades, outlet installation, lighting design, and whole-home surge protection. Every job is backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
featureSections.cardBody: Modernize your electrical panel to handle today's power demands safely. We install top brands with a 10-year warranty.

featureSections.title: Reliable Electrical Services for Your Business
featureSections.body: Minimize downtime with our commercial electrical expertise. We handle new construction, tenant improvements, data cabling, and emergency repairs for offices, retail, and industrial facilities. Fast response, professional service.
featureSections.cardBody: Electrical emergency? We're on call 24/7 to restore power and safety to your business. Average response time: 45 minutes.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured

whyChooseUs.title: Same-Day Service
whyChooseUs.description: Most electrical issues can't wait. We offer same-day appointments for emergencies and urgent repairs. Call by noon for service today.

whyChooseUs.title: 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
whyChooseUs.description: If you're not happy, we make it right. Our work is backed by a warranty on parts and labor. Your peace of mind is our priority.

servicesPage.intro: From minor repairs to major installations, our licensed electricians deliver safe, code-compliant solutions for homes and businesses in Dallas and surrounding areas. Explore our full range of electrical services below.

services.title: Residential Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Complete electrical solutions for your home - safe, reliable, and affordable.
services.longDescription: Your home's electrical system should work flawlessly to keep your family safe and comfortable. We offer a full spectrum of residential services including outlet and switch repair, lighting installation, ceiling fan mounting, electrical panel upgrades, whole-home surge protection, and complete rewiring. Our electricians are trained in the latest safety standards and use top-quality materials. Whether you need a quick fix or a major renovation, we treat your home with respect and leave it cleaner than we found it.
benefits: Increased home value and energy efficiency
Free detailed estimates for any project

process.title: Inspection & Diagnosis
process.description: We thoroughly inspect your electrical system to identify issues and recommend the best solution. No guesswork, just precise diagnostics.

process.title: Detailed Proposal
process.description: You receive a written estimate with clear pricing, scope of work, and timeline. We answer all your questions before any work begins.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Our licensed electricians complete the work efficiently, with minimal disruption. We test everything and clean up afterwards.

faqs.question: How do I know if my electrical panel needs upgrading?
faqs.answer: Common signs include flickering lights, frequent breaker trips, buzzing sounds, or if your panel is over 25 years old. We offer free inspections to assess your panel's condition.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency residential service?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide 24/7 emergency service for issues like power outages, sparking outlets, or downed wires. Call (214) 206-8435 anytime.

services.title: Commercial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your business running with reliable commercial electrical expertise.
services.longDescription: Downtime costs money. Our commercial electricians specialize in minimizing disruption while delivering top-quality work. We handle new construction wiring, tenant improvements, lighting retrofits, data cabling, backup generator installation, and emergency repairs. We understand commercial codes and work closely with property managers, contractors, and business owners to ensure projects are completed on time and within budget. From small retail shops to large industrial facilities, we have the experience to handle any job.
benefits: Custom maintenance plans to prevent issues
Single point of contact for multi-site projects

process.title: Needs Assessment
process.description: We meet with you to understand your business operations, electrical needs, and any specific requirements. This ensures a tailored solution.

process.title: Custom Proposal & Scheduling
process.description: You receive a detailed proposal with costs, timeline, and minimal disruption plan. We schedule work at your convenience, including after hours.

process.title: Execution & Follow-Up
process.description: Our team performs the work efficiently, with regular updates. We conduct thorough testing and provide documentation for your records.

faqs.question: Do you offer maintenance contracts for commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer customizable preventive maintenance plans that include regular inspections, testing, and priority service. This helps avoid costly breakdowns.

faqs.question: Can you handle emergency repairs for my business?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We have 24/7 emergency service with rapid response. Many commercial emergencies are resolved within hours to get you back in operation.

services.title: Lighting Design & Installation
services.shortDescription: Transform your space with custom lighting solutions that save energy.
services.longDescription: Great lighting enhances ambiance, improves safety, and reduces energy costs. Our lighting services include indoor and outdoor design, LED retrofits, landscape lighting, security lighting, and smart home integration. We work with you to create a lighting plan that matches your style and budget. Our electricians ensure every fixture is installed correctly and efficiently. Whether you want to highlight architectural features or brighten a workspace, we bring your vision to light.
benefits: Custom designs tailored to your space

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We discuss your goals, preferences, and budget. Our team creates a lighting plan with fixture recommendations and layout.

process.title: Product Selection & Approval
process.description: We source high-quality fixtures that fit your design and energy needs. You approve the selections before installation.

process.title: Installation & Testing
process.description: Our electricians install all fixtures, wiring, and controls. We test every light and ensure perfect operation.

faqs.question: How much can I save with LED lighting?
faqs.answer: LEDs use up to 80% less energy than incandescent bulbs and last 25 times longer. Most customers see a return on investment within 1-2 years through lower utility bills.

faqs.question: Do you install smart lighting systems?
faqs.answer: Yes! We install and configure smart lighting from brands like Lutron, Philips Hue, and others. Control your lights from your phone or set schedules for convenience and security.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for safety, capacity, and peace of mind.
services.longDescription: Your electrical panel is the heart of your home's electrical system. If it's outdated, overloaded, or unsafe, it can pose serious risks. We specialize in panel upgrades that increase capacity, improve safety, and meet modern electrical demands. Our electricians handle everything from 100-amp to 400-amp upgrades, including service entrance replacements. We use top brands like Square D, Eaton, and Siemens, and our work comes with a full warranty. Protect your home and family with a professional panel upgrade.
benefits: Eliminate breaker trips and flickering lights
Support for modern appliances and electronics
Increased home safety and resale value

process.title: Inspection & Load Calculation
process.description: We assess your current panel, calculate your home's electrical load, and determine the right upgrade size. This ensures your system meets your needs.

process.title: Permitting & Planning
process.description: We handle all necessary permits and plan the upgrade to minimize downtime. You'll get a clear timeline and cost estimate.

process.title: Installation & Testing
process.description: Our licensed electricians perform the upgrade safely and efficiently. We test every circuit, label the panel, and clean up thoroughly.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most residential panel upgrades take 4-8 hours. We work efficiently to restore power as quickly as possible, often the same day.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit for a panel upgrade?
faqs.answer: Yes, panel upgrades require a permit and inspection to ensure code compliance. We handle all permitting and scheduling for you, so you don't have to worry.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Electrician Since 2011
about.mission: Our mission is to provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services to every customer, treating your home or business as if it were our own.
story: Dallas Electrics Contractor Pros was founded in 2011 by master electrician John Davis, who saw a need for honest, high-quality electrical work in the Dallas area. Starting with just a truck and a commitment to excellence, John built a reputation for reliability and craftsmanship. Over the years, we have grown into a team of licensed professionals serving thousands of satisfied customers across Dallas and surrounding communities.

Today, we continue to uphold the same values that started it all: transparency, quality, and customer care. Every electrician on our team undergoes rigorous training and background checks. We invest in the latest tools and technology to ensure efficient, safe service. Whether it's a simple outlet repair or a complex commercial installation, we approach every job with the same dedication. We're proud to be rated 4.8 stars and trusted by our neighbors.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. Every job follows strict protocols and code requirements to protect you and your property.

coreValues.title: Honest Communication
coreValues.description: We explain everything in plain language, provide transparent pricing, and keep you informed throughout the process.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: Our team stays updated with the latest industry standards, technologies, and best practices through ongoing training.

coreValues.title: Community Focused
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve our local community, supporting local events and giving back through free electrical safety inspections for seniors.
